rows.name: Used cars and trucks
rows.driverSnapshot: SETA02 SA model: rho 0.47 * prior CPI SA +0.10 pp + Manheim m0, m2 signal -0.37 pp * volatility scale 0.71 + level gap z=-1.04, mean-reversion adj +0.02 pp; timing m0 2026-06 +0.11% pub 2026-07-07; m2 2026-04 -1.56% pub 2026-05-07. Compared against CUSR0000SETA02; no asymmetry term kept. SA forecast converted to NSA using the component's historical SA/NSA offset.
